talents.name: Suppression
talents.description: Reduces the chance for enemies to resist your Affliction spells by 2%.

talents.name: Improved Corruption
talents.description: Reduces the casting time of your Corruption spell by 0.4 sec.

talents.name: Improved Curse of Weakness
talents.description: Increases the effect of your Curse of Weakness by 10%.

talents.name: Improved Drain Soul
talents.description: Returns 7% of your maximum mana if the target is killed by you while you drain its soul. In addition, your Affliction spells generate 5% less threat.

talents.name: Improved Life Tap
talents.description: Increases the amount of Mana awarded by your Life Tap spell by 10%.

talents.name: Soul Siphon
talents.description: Increases the amount drained by your Drain Life spell by an additional 2% for each Affliction effect on the target, up to a maximum of 24% additional effect.

talents.name: Improved Curse of Agony
talents.description: Increases the damage done by your Curse of Agony by 5%.

talents.name: Fel Concentration
talents.description: Gives you a 14% chance to avoid interruption caused by damage while channeling the Drain Life, Drain Mana, or Drain Soul spell.

talents.name: Amplify Curse
talents.description: Increases the effect of your next Curse of Doom or Curse of Agony by 50%, or your next Curse of Exhaustion by an additional 20%. Lasts 30 sec.

talents.name: Grim Reach
talents.description: Increases the range of your Affliction spells by 10%.

talents.name: Nightfall
talents.description: Gives your Corruption and Drain Life spells a 2% chance to cause you to enter a Shadow Trance state after damaging the opponent. The Shadow Trance state reduces the casting time of your next Shadow Bolt spell by 100%. (Proc chance: 2%)

talents.name: Empowered Corruption
talents.description: Your Corruption spell gains an additional 12% of your bonus spell damage effects.

talents.name: Shadow Embrace
talents.description: Your Corruption, Curse of Agony, Siphon Life and Seed of Corruption spells also cause the Shadow Embrace effect, which reduces physical damage caused by 1%.

talents.name: Siphon Life
talents.description: Transfers 15 health from the target to the caster every 3 sec. Lasts 30 sec.

talents.name: Curse of Exhaustion
talents.description: Reduces the target's movement speed by 30 % for 12 sec. Only one Curse per Warlock can be active on any one target.

talents.name: Shadow Mastery
talents.description: Increases the damage dealt or life drained by your Shadow spells by 2%.

talents.name: Contagion
talents.description: Increases the damage of Curse of Agony, Corruption and Seed of Corruption by 1% and reduces the chance your Affliction spells will be dispelled by an additional 6%.

talents.name: Dark Pact
talents.description: Drains 305 of your pet's Mana, returning 100% to you.

talents.name: Improved Howl of Terror
talents.description: Reduces the casting time of your Howl of Terror spell by 0.8 sec.

talents.name: Malediction
talents.description: Increases the damage bonus effect of your Curse of the Elements spell by an additional 1%.

talents.name: Unstable Affliction
talents.description: Shadow energy slowly destroys the target, causing 660 damage over 18 sec. In addition, if the Unstable Affliction is dispelled it will cause 990 damage to the dispeller and silence them for 5 sec.

talents.name: Improved Healthstone
talents.description: Increases the amount of Health restored by your Healthstone by 10%.

talents.name: Improved Imp
talents.description: Increases the effect of your Imp's Firebolt, Fire Shield, and Blood Pact spells by 10%.

talents.name: Demonic Embrace
talents.description: Increases your total Stamina by 3% but reduces your total Spirit by 1%.

talents.name: Improved Health Funnel
talents.description: Increases the amount of Health transferred by your Health Funnel spell by 10% and reduces the initial health cost by 10%.

talents.name: Improved Voidwalker
talents.description: Increases the effectiveness of your Voidwalker's Torment, Consume Shadows, Sacrifice and Suffering spells by 10%.

talents.name: Fel Intellect
talents.description: Increases the Intellect of your Imp, Voidwalker, Succubus, Incubus, Felhunter and Felguard by 5% and increases your maximum mana by 1%.

talents.name: Improved Sayaad
talents.description: Increases the effect of your Succubus' and Incubus' Lash of Pain and Soothing Kiss spells by 10%, and increases the duration of your Succubus' and Incubus' Seduction and Lesser Invisibility spells by 10%.

talents.name: Fel Domination
talents.description: Your next Imp, Voidwalker, Succubus, Incubus, Felhunter or Felguard Summon spell has its casting time reduced by 5.5 sec and its Mana cost reduced by 50%.

talents.name: Fel Stamina
talents.description: Increases the Stamina of your Imp, Voidwalker, Succubus, Incubus, Felhunter and Felguard by 5% and increases your maximum health by 1%.

talents.name: Demonic Aegis
talents.description: Increases the effectiveness of your Demon Armor and Fel Armor spells by 10%.

talents.name: Master Summoner
talents.description: Reduces the casting time of your Imp, Voidwalker, Succubus, Incubus, Felhunter and Fel Guard Summoning spells by 2 sec and the Mana cost by 20%.

talents.name: Unholy Power
talents.description: Increases the damage done by your Voidwalker, Succubus, Incubus, Felhunter and Felguard's melee attacks and your Imp's Firebolt by 4%.

talents.name: Improved Subjugate Demon
talents.description: Reduces the Attack Speed and Casting Speed penalty of your Subjugate Demon spell by 5% and reduces the resist chance by 5%.

talents.name: Demonic Sacrifice
talents.description: When activated, sacrifices your summoned demon to grant you an effect that lasts 30 min. The effect is canceled if any Demon is summoned. Imp: Increases your Fire damage by 15%. Voidwalker: Restores 2% of total health every 4 sec. Succubus/Incubus: Increases your Shadow damage by 15%. Felhunter: Restores 3% of total mana every 4 sec. Felguard: Increases your Shadow damage by 10% and restores 2% of total mana every 4 sec.

talents.name: Master Conjuror
talents.description: Increases the bonus Fire damage from Firestones and the Firestone effect by 15% and increases the spell critical strike rating bonus of your Spellstone by 15%.

talents.name: Mana Feed
talents.description: When you gain mana from Drain Mana or Life Tap spells, your pet gains 33% of the mana you gain.

talents.name: Master Demonologist
talents.description: Grants both the Warlock and the summoned demon an effect as long as that demon is active. Imp - Reduces threat caused by 4%. Voidwalker - Reduces physical damage taken by 2%. Succubus/Incubus - Increases all damage caused by 2%. Felhunter - Increases all resistances by .2 per level. Felguard - Increases all damage caused by 1% and all resistances by .1 per level.

talents.name: Demonic Resilience
talents.description: Reduces the chance you'll be critically hit by melee and spells by 1% and reduces all damage your summoned demon takes by 5%.

talents.name: Soul Link
talents.description: When active, 20% of all damage taken by the caster is taken by your Imp, Voidwalker, Succubus, Incubus, Felhunter, Felguard, or subjugated demon instead. That damage cannot be prevented. In addition, both the demon and master will inflict 5% more damage. Lasts as long as the demon is active and controlled.

talents.name: Demonic Knowledge
talents.description: Increases your spell damage by an amount equal to 4% of the total of your active demon's Stamina plus Intellect.

talents.name: Demonic Tactics
talents.description: Increases melee and spell critical strike chance for you and your summoned demon by 1%.

talents.name: Summon Felguard
talents.description: Summons a Felguard under the command of the Warlock.

talents.name: Improved Shadow Bolt
talents.description: Your Shadow Bolt critical strikes increase Shadow damage dealt to the target by 4% until 4 non-periodic damage sources are applied. Effect lasts a maximum of 12 sec.

talents.name: Cataclysm
talents.description: Reduces the Mana cost of your Destruction spells by 1%.

talents.name: Bane
talents.description: Reduces the casting time of your Shadow Bolt and Immolate spells by 0.1 sec and your Soul Fire spell by 0.4 sec.

talents.name: Aftermath
talents.description: Gives your Destruction spells a 2% chance to daze the target for 5 sec. (Proc chance: 2%)

talents.name: Improved Firebolt
talents.description: Reduces the casting time of your Imp's Firebolt spell by 0.25 sec.

talents.name: Improved Lash of Pain
talents.description: Reduces the cooldown of your Succubus' and Incubus' Lash of Pain spell by 3 sec.

talents.name: Devastation
talents.description: Increases the critical strike chance of your Destruction spells by 1%.

talents.name: Shadowburn
talents.description: Instantly blasts the target for 91 to 104 Shadow damage. If the target dies within 5 sec of Shadowburn, and yields experience or honor, the caster gains a Soul Shard.

talents.name: Intensity
talents.description: Gives you a 35% chance to resist interruption caused by damage while casting or channeling any Destruction spell.

talents.name: Destructive Reach
talents.description: Increases the range of your Destruction spells by 10% and reduces threat caused by Destruction spells by 5%.

talents.name: Improved Searing Pain
talents.description: Increases the critical strike chance of your Searing Pain spell by 4%.

talents.name: Pyroclasm
talents.description: Gives your Rain of Fire, Hellfire, and Soul Fire spells a 13% chance to stun the target for 3 sec.

talents.name: Improved Immolate
talents.description: Increases the initial damage of your Immolate spell by 5%.

talents.name: Ruin
talents.description: Increases the critical strike damage bonus of your Destruction spells by 100%.

talents.name: Nether Protection
talents.description: After being hit with a Shadow or Fire spell, you have a 10% chance to become immune to Shadow and Fire spells for 4 sec. (Proc chance: 10%)

talents.name: Emberstorm
talents.description: Increases the damage done by your Fire spells by 2% and reduces the cast time of your Incinerate spell by 2%.

talents.name: Backlash
talents.description: Increases your critical strike chance with spells by an additional 1% and gives you a 8% chance when hit by a physical attack to reduce the cast time of your next Shadow Bolt or Incinerate spell by 100%. This effect lasts 8 sec and will not occur more than once every 8 seconds. (Proc chance: 8%, 8s cooldown)

talents.name: Conflagrate
talents.description: Ignites a target that is already afflicted by your Immolate, dealing 249 to 316 Fire damage and consuming the Immolate spell.

talents.name: Soul Leech
talents.description: Gives your Shadow Bolt, Shadowburn, Soul Fire, Incinerate, Searing Pain and Conflagrate spells a 10% chance to return health equal to 20% of the damage caused. (Proc chance: 10%)

talents.name: Shadow and Flame
talents.description: Your Shadow Bolt and Incinerate spells gain an additional 4% of your bonus spell damage effects.

talents.name: Shadowfury
talents.description: Shadowfury is unleashed, causing 357 to 422 Shadow damage and stunning all enemies within 8 yds for 2 sec.
